jurisdictions.name: Hong Kong
jurisdictions.coverage_notes: Founding jurisdiction. Live RSS watcher (SFC + HKMA feeds), live analyst/verifier via the scheduled CCR trigger, fully seeded.

jurisdictions.name: United States

jurisdictions.name: European Union
